Notes: Single UPDATE deletes an existing CNAME at host.campus.edu. and adds an A RR at the same owner. The follow-up QUERY checks whether the server accepted the transition or enforced CNAME exclusivity against the pre-state.

Steps.Description: Delete the existing CNAME at host.campus.edu. and add an A RR at the same owner in one UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the CNAME remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: host.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the A RR was installed at the owner name.
